# Trabectedin 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Trabectedin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Trabectedin</strong> 目前有 <strong>25 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Trabectedin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Yondelis is indicated for the treatment of patients with advanced soft-tissue sarcoma, after failure of anthracyclines and ifosfamide, or who are unsuited to receive these agents. Efficacy data are...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>female breast carcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>ovarian clear cell adenocarcinoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>malignant dysgerminomatous germ cell tumor of ovary（99.2%）</li>
<li>borderline epithelial tumor of ovary（99.2%）</li>
<li>hereditary site-specific ovarian cancer syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>malignant sex cord stromal tumor of ovary（99.0%）</li>
<li>familial ovarian cancer（99.0%）</li>
<li>choriocarcinoma of ovary（98.9%）</li>
<li>gonadal germ cell tumor（98.9%）</li>
<li>ovarian primitive germ cell tumor（98.9%）</li>
<li>maligant granulosa cell tumor of ovary（98.7%）</li>
<li>ovarian malignant mesothelioma（98.6%）</li>
<li>malignant non-dysgerminomatous germ cell tumor of ovary（98.6%）</li>
<li>malignant germ cell tumor of ovary（98.6%）</li>
<li>yolk sac tumor（98.6%）</li>
<li>ovarian adenosarcoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>ovarian cancer, susceptibility to, 1（98.5%）</li>
<li>ovarian Sertoli-Leydig cell tumor（98.5%）</li>
<li>ovarian thecoma（98.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/trabectedin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
